scope.summary:
Implement wikilinks, transclusion, and backlinks in the native rich-text editor, binding to the backend loom edge + knowledge document backlink APIs. This MT ports the React wikilink.ts parsing logic, the LoomTransclusionView component, and the backlinks panel from RichDocumentView.tsx.

EXPECTED DIFF SHAPE:
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_text/wikilinks/mod.rs
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_text/wikilinks/parser.rs (ports app/src/lib/editor/wikilink.ts)
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_text/wikilinks/inline_view.rs (renders a Mark::Wikilink as a colored clickable chip inline in the paragraph)
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_text/wikilinks/autocomplete.rs (as the operator types '[[', show a popup with loom block / document search results)
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_text/wikilinks/transclusion_view.rs (renders a BlockNode::Transclusion as a read-through embedded block preview)
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_text/wikilinks/backlinks_panel.rs (side panel listing all documents that link to the current document)
- Extend src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_text/renderer/block_renderer.rs to call transclusion_view for TransclusionNode kind.
- Extend inline_view dispatch in renderer to paint wikilink marks as chips.
- Reuse the shared command/selection/clipboard bus from the existing WP-011 modules command_registry.rs + event_bus.rs to route wikilink autocomplete commands and editor events; reuse loom_graph.rs for any loom block reference resolution affordance, and command_palette.rs + command_registry.rs for the autocomplete trigger surface. Do NOT invent a shared interaction bus module; the real flat modules above provide it.

WIKILINK SYNTAX (parser.rs - port wikilink.ts):
- Regex: [[prefix:value]] or [[prefix:value|label]]
- Known prefixes (port WP009_WIKILINK_KIND_BY_PREFIX from extension_inventory.ts):
  'block' -> LoomBlock ref, 'doc' -> RichDocument ref, 'wp' -> WorkPacket ref, 'file' -> file ref, 'tag' -> tag ref
- Unknown prefix -> WikilinkKind::Unknown (not silently dropped; renders with a warning chip color)
- Parse fn: fn parse_wikilink(raw: &str) -> Option<ParsedWikilink> where ParsedWikilink { kind: WikilinkKind, ref_value: String, label: String, resolved: bool }
- Input handling: when the operator types '[[' in the editor, parser.rs sets an autocomplete_mode flag in RichEditorState; the autocomplete popup (autocomplete.rs) appears.

INLINE WIKILINK CHIP (inline_view.rs):
- Wikilink mark in the DocModel renders as a colored rounded-rect inline chip: text = label (or ref_value if no label), background = accent color from egui theme.
- Chip is clickable: on click, emit a WikilinkActivated event (stored in RichEditorState.pending_events: Vec<EditorEvent>) for the host shell to route to Loom or the document viewer.
- Unresolved/unknown wikilinks render with a warning-yellow background and a '?' prefix.
- AccessKit: each chip = author_id = format!('wikilink-chip-{ref_value_hash}'), Role::Link, Actions::Click.

AUTOCOMPLETE (autocomplete.rs):
- On '[['  keypress, open an egui popup below the caret.
- Query: call GET /workspaces/{workspace_id}/loom/search?q={typed_text}&limit=10 (search API from LoomSearchV2Panel reference) or GET /knowledge/documents?q={typed_text}&limit=10 depending on the prefix hint.
- Display results as a selectable list (egui::SelectableLabel). Arrow keys move selection; Enter/Tab inserts the wikilink mark and closes the popup. Escape cancels.
- AccessKit: popup = author_id = 'wikilink-autocomplete', each result row = 'wikilink-result-{i}'.

TRANSCLUSION VIEW (transclusion_view.rs - port LoomTransclusionView):
- A TransclusionNode in the DocModel (kind = Transclusion, attrs = { block_id: String }) renders as a read-only embedded preview of the target LoomBlock.
- Async fetch: GET /workspaces/{workspace_id}/loom/blocks/{block_id}/transclusion -> LoomBlockTransclusion (from api.ts: title, content_preview, content_type, last_updated).
- Render: rounded border rect, title in bold, content_preview as plain text truncated to 3 lines, 'Open block ->' link button.
- Error states: loading spinner, typed error chip for 404/network failure.
- AccessKit: container = 'transclusion-{block_id}', open button = 'transclusion-open-{block_id}'.

BACKLINKS PANEL (backlinks_panel.rs - port RichDocumentView.tsx backlinks section):
- Async fetch: GET /knowledge/documents/{document_id}/backlinks -> { source_document_id, backlinks: [{ source_doc_id, source_title, link_kind, ref_value, ... }] }
- Render as a collapsible egui::CollapsingHeader ('Backlinks (N)'). Each entry = clickable label (document title). Click emits BacklinkActivated event for the shell to navigate.
- Empty state: 'No backlinks yet.' text.
- AccessKit: panel = 'backlinks-panel', each entry = 'backlink-{source_doc_id}'.

BACKLINK CREATION (persistence):
- When a document containing wikilinks is saved (MT-020 calls saveRichDocument), the backend AUTOMATICALLY persists backlinks from the content_json (backend knowledge_document/backlinks.rs). No separate API call is needed from this MT; the wikilink marks in the DocJson output carry the ref_value that the backend indexes.
- Document this explicitly in backlinks_panel.rs as a code comment: 'Backlinks are written by the backend on save, not by this MT.'

STEP-BY-STEP:
1. Port wikilink.ts WIKILINK_REGEX and classifyWikilink to Rust in parser.rs using the regex crate.
2. Add regex = '1' to src/frontend/handshake_native/Cargo.toml.
3. Implement inline rendering in src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_text/renderer/block_renderer.rs: when painting a TextLeaf, check for Wikilink marks; for each, compute the pixel span from cosmic-text glyph positions and paint a colored Rect with the label text on top.
4. In autocomplete.rs, detect the '[['  trigger in src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_text/renderer/input_handler.rs and set RichEditorState.wikilink_autocomplete = Some(AutocompleteState { query: String, results: Vec<WikilinkResult>, selected: usize }).
5. autocomplete.rs renders an egui popup window at the caret pixel position; async queries the search API.
6. On Enter in autocomplete: remove the '[['  text, insert a Wikilink mark via AddMark transaction.
7. Implement transclusion_view.rs and wire to BlockNode::Transclusion in src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_text/renderer/block_renderer.rs.
8. Implement backlinks_panel.rs and mount it in src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_text/renderer/rich_editor_widget.rs as a collapsible panel below the content area.
9. Cargo tests: parse_wikilink('[[block:BLK-001|My Note]]') returns kind=Block, ref_value='BLK-001', label='My Note'. parse_wikilink('[[unknown:xyz]]') returns kind=Unknown, resolved=false. Autocomplete state transitions (mock API).

DEPENDENCIES: MT-011 (Wikilink mark in Mark enum, Transclusion node kind), MT-012 (inline chip painting in block_renderer, caret pixel position for autocomplete popup).
acceptance_criteria: parse_wikilink('[[block:BLK-001|My Note]]') returns WikilinkKind::Block, ref_value='BLK-001', label='My Note' (unit test).
Wikilink mark renders as a visible colored chip inline in a paragraph in the kittest screenshot.
Clicking a wikilink chip emits a WikilinkActivated event in RichEditorState.pending_events (cargo test with a simulated click).
Typing '[[' in the editor opens the autocomplete popup (kittest interaction test).
Autocomplete popup closes on Escape and removes the '[['  text trigger (kittest).
TransclusionNode renders a bordered preview box with a title and content_preview (kittest screenshot with mock transclusion response).
Backlinks panel renders a collapsible header 'Backlinks (N)' and lists source document titles (kittest with mock backlinks response).
AccessKit: 'wikilink-autocomplete' popup is present in the accessibility tree when autocomplete is open.
All cargo tests for the wikilinks module pass with 0 failures.
proof_targets: cargo test -p handshake-native -- wikilinks outputs 'test result: ok'.
Integration test (real backend): cargo test -p handshake-native --test test_wikilinks -- test_real_backlinks --ignored shows backlinks fetched for a seeded document.
implementation_notes: The wikilink chip painting must happen INSIDE the cosmic-text text run: pause the text rendering, paint the chip Rect at the glyph span coordinates, then continue rendering. Do not try to insert the chip into the text flow; overlay it on the exact glyph positions.
The autocomplete popup must be positioned at the caret pixel position (from caret.rs), not at the mouse position. This ensures it opens correctly even when using keyboard-only input.
Backlinks are fetched once when the document loads and refreshed only on explicit user action (a refresh button in the panel header) to avoid constant background polling.

The WikilinkActivated event is not handled inside this MT; it is placed in RichEditorState.pending_events for the parent shell (WP-011) to drain and route. Document the expected event shape in a comment in the event enum.
regex crate is already in most Rust projects; if not in src/frontend/handshake_native/Cargo.toml, add it. Use once_cell::sync::Lazy to compile the wikilink regex once.

AccessKit author_ids for chips, autocomplete popup, transclusion container, and backlinks panel must be registered through the existing WP-011 accessibility/ module (accessibility/mod.rs, accessibility/registry.rs, accessibility/live.rs, accessibility/snapshot.rs); do not stand up a separate accessibility layer.

Cross-WP dependency: the WikilinkActivated and BacklinkActivated events are drained and routed by the parent shell delivered in WP-011 (app.rs + event_bus.rs + command_registry.rs). This MT only enqueues events into RichEditorState.pending_events; routing is owned by WP-011 and is not implemented here.

The autocomplete search and any model-facing wikilink resolution affordances must surface through the existing MCP tool surface (mcp/mod.rs, mcp/tools.rs, mcp/action.rs) where parallel-model interaction is required; do not create a parallel command path outside command_registry.rs + event_bus.rs.

WIKILINK = hsLink NODE, NOT Mark::Wikilink (KERNEL_BUILDER gate 2026-06-22 - CRITICAL, MT-011 reconciliation): MT-011's harden REMOVED Mark::Wikilink and made wikilinks the Child::HsLink inline-atom NODE {ref_kind, ref_value, label, resolved}. This contract's 'Wikilink mark' / 'insert a Wikilink mark via AddMark' wording is the OLD shape MT-011 FIXED - OVERRIDE it. Render the inline chip from the EXISTING Child::HsLink atom (ref_kind in the wikilink family: wikilink/block/doc/wp/file/tag); autocomplete confirm REMOVES the '[[' text and INSERTS an HsLink atom via InsertNode (NOT AddMark); parse_wikilink('[[block:BLK-001|My Note]]') maps to HsLinkNode { ref_kind:'block', ref_value:'BLK-001', label:Some('My Note') }. Verify the prefix->ref_kind mapping against app/src/lib/editor/wikilink.ts (WP009_WIKILINK_KIND_BY_PREFIX) + hs_link_node.ts. The MT-014 media embeds already render from this same Child::HsLink by ref_kind - keep one unified hsLink dispatch.

TRANSCLUSION NODE SHAPE (KERNEL_BUILDER gate - same gap class as tableHeader/embed): MT-011 NodeKind has NO Transclusion variant. Before rendering, VERIFY against the real backend content_json + app/src components/LoomTransclusionView.tsx whether a block transclusion is (a) a SEPARATE node type, (b) an hsLink ref_kind variant (e.g. ref_kind='block' with a transclusion/embed display mode), or (c) a block node with a block_id attr. Render from the REAL captured shape. If a separate node is genuinely needed, ADD it to MT-011's model (node.rs NodeKind + doc_json json_to_block/block_to_json, now in allowed_paths) anchored to the captured backend shape - do NOT invent a {block_id} attrs shape that may not round-trip. Consider consolidating with the MT-016-carried tableHeader model addition.

BACKEND PROOF REALITY (MT-008/MT-014 pattern): transclusion fetch (GET /workspaces/{id}/loom/blocks/{id}/transclusion), backlinks (GET /knowledge/documents/{id}/backlinks), autocomplete search (loom/search or documents?q=) bind the REAL backend; gate the live-content ACs behind the integration feature + NEEDS_MANAGED_RESOURCE_PROOF if unseeded - do NOT fake. parse_wikilink + chip render + autocomplete STATE transitions + 150ms debounce (MC-002, assert 1 call for 5 keystrokes) + WikilinkKind::Unknown exhaustive (MC-005) + transclusion-404->Remove-embed chip (MC-003) + backlinks generation-counter cancel (MC-004) are ALL unit-testable STANDALONE with mocks - those must pass with no backend.

CHIP PAINTING + EVENTS (KERNEL_BUILDER gate): the inline wikilink chip overlays on MT-012's egui LayoutJob/Galley glyph positions (Galley row layout / pos_from_cursor), NOT cosmic-text (MT-012 did NOT use cosmic-text); the chip Y must be SCROLL-ADJUSTED (subtract scroll offset, MC-001). The autocomplete popup anchors at the caret pixel from the Galley. WikilinkActivated/BacklinkActivated are enqueued in RichEditorState.pending_events; the SHELL drains+routes them (E11/MT-069 host wiring - not this MT). Screenshots mt015_*.png to the EXTERNAL Handshake_Artifacts/handshake-test/wp-kernel-012-mt-015/ root + assert_no_local_artifact_dir(). regex via once_cell::Lazy (add regex dep only if absent). ACCESSKIT VARIANT: Role::Link - field-correct nearest accesskit 0.21.1; ACs assert author_id.
ports_from_react: app/src/components/LoomTransclusionView.tsx (transclusion block rendering: title, preview text, open button, loading/error states)
app/src/components/RichDocumentView.tsx (backlinks panel: collapsing header, backlink list, BacklinkActivated navigation)
binds_backend_api: Search for autocomplete: GET /workspaces/{workspace_id}/loom/search (loom search API from LoomSearchV2Panel) or GET /knowledge/documents?q= (knowledge document list with query param)

risks: Wikilink chip painted at wrong pixel coordinates when the paragraph is scrolled and the caret Y offset is not adjusted for scroll position.
Autocomplete popup issues a search API call on every keystroke inside the '[[ ...' token, causing request flooding on slow backend.
Transclusion of a deleted block returns 404 but the TransclusionNode stays in the doc forever with no operator affordance to remove it.
Backlinks panel fetches on every frame when the document_id prop changes rapidly (doc switching), causing N concurrent in-flight requests.
Unknown wikilink kind causes a panic in the WikilinkKind enum match if an exhaustive match is used without a wildcard arm.
minimum_controls: Chip pixel Y coordinate must be relative to the scroll-adjusted paint origin; block_renderer must subtract the scroll offset from absolute glyph positions before painting chips.

Autocomplete must debounce queries with a 150 ms delay (tokio::time::sleep or egui timer) and cancel in-flight requests when the query changes; cargo test asserts only 1 HTTP call for 5 rapid keystrokes.
404 on transclusion fetch renders an error chip with action button 'Remove embed' that issues a DeleteNode transaction; cargo test with a 404 mock verifies the chip appears.
Backlinks fetch is triggered by document_id change via a watch mechanism; use a generation counter to cancel stale requests; only the latest request's result is applied.
WikilinkKind enum must have an Unknown(String) variant; all match arms must be exhaustive; cargo test verifies parsing an unrecognized prefix does not panic.

research_provenance.source: KERNEL_BUILDER gate + MT-011 hsLink reconciliation + MT-014 embed dispatch + MT-012 Galley engine
corrections: wikilink = Child::HsLink node inserted via InsertNode, NOT Mark::Wikilink/AddMark (contract uses the old pre-MT-011-harden shape)
transclusion node shape verified vs real backend before inventing; add to MT-011 model if needed (anchored)
real-backend transclusion/backlinks/search proof or NEEDS_MANAGED_RESOURCE_PROOF; parser+chip+autocomplete unit-testable
chip overlays Galley glyph positions (not cosmic-text), scroll-adjusted; events to pending_events (routing E11); screenshots external; accesskit variant

implementation_result.implemented_by: KERNEL_BUILDER folded pipeline wf_992f55ab (impl + adversarial-review + harden)
commits: c976dfbd fix backlinks panel perpetual-spinner regression (post-gate)
implementation_result.shape_reconciled: Wikilinks bind to the EXISTING Child::HsLink atom NODE (NOT the contract's Mark::Wikilink/AddMark - that shape MT-011's harden deleted); autocomplete confirm inserts the hsLink atom. Transclusion VERIFIED to need a separate node -> added Child::Transclusion/TransclusionNode to MT-011 model (node.rs+doc_json, anchored). Parser anchored to the REAL WP009_WIKILINK_KIND_BY_PREFIX table: 'block' is NOT in the real table -> Unknown (contract examples != real table; agent reconciled).
implementation_result.proofs: AC-1..10 GREEN; parser + inline chip + autocomplete([[ open/Escape/debounce) + transclusion(404->Remove embed) + backlinks panel; 696 lib (independently reconfirmed) + 50 wikilinks + 8 integration; clippy --all-targets clean (harden fixed unnecessary_get_then_check); wikilink chip ('My WP' green inline pill) + backlinks panel + transclusion preview visually verified; screenshots EXTERNAL (git ls-files src/**/*.png empty).
implementation_result.bugs_caught_and_fixed: Review caught a 4th FALSE clippy-clean (clippy --all-targets failed on unnecessary_get_then_check in runtime.rs - full-suite rule surfaced it) + a wgpu test-parallelism issue (3 screenshot tests need --test-threads=1); harden fixed both.
implementation_result.blocked: PT-4 real transclusion+backlinks = NEEDS_MANAGED_RESOURCE_PROOF: ReqwestWikilinkBackend binds the real /loom/blocks/{id}/transclusion + /knowledge/documents/{id}/backlinks endpoints, gated #[ignore]+integration; run with --features integration -- --ignored against a live seeded backend. NOT faked.
implementation_result.waiver_granted: Child::Transclusion forces mechanical exhaustive-match arms across position.rs/schema.rs/commands.rs/line_layout.rs/block_renderer.rs/rich_editor_widget.rs (added node.rs/doc_json/position.rs/schema.rs/commands.rs to allowed_paths). All route the new variant to existing inline-atom behavior - mechanical, not behavior changes. Granted per GLOBAL-SCOPE-005.
implementation_result.carried_forward_MT_016: TRANSFORM GAP: Step::InsertNode only inserts Child::Block, so confirm_wikilink inserts the hsLink atom by DIRECT child mutation -> the atom insert is NOT on the undo stack (Ctrl+Z won't undo a wikilink/embed insert). Generalize MT-011 transform.rs to support inline-atom (Child::HsLink/Text/Transclusion) insert/delete as proper undoable Steps; affects wikilink confirm + embed insert undo. Doc round-trips correctly (confirmed_doc_round_trips); only undo-integration is missing.
implementation_result.post_gate_regression_fix: The backlinks panel showed an egui::Spinner for BOTH Idle and Loading, and refresh_backlinks entered Loading before the runtime check -> headless rendered a forever-repainting Spinner -> 12 full-widget tests (test_embeds/test_formatting_toolbar/test_rich_editor_widget) went RED + idle-CPU burn. Undetected at the MT-015 gate because that gate ran --lib + test_wikilinks only, NOT the full integration suite. Fixed (c976dfbd): only enter Loading with a runtime; render Idle as a neutral non-animating state. Full suite green. GATE LESSON: when an MT touches SHARED widget code (rich_editor_widget.rs/block_renderer.rs), the gate MUST run the FULL `cargo test` (every bin), not just --lib + the MT's own bin.
